# Skull

## Overview

- Skull is an anatomic structure or system in anatomy.

## Epidemiology

- The epidemiology of Skull depends on age, sex, geography, exposure, comorbid disease, medication use, pregnancy status when relevant, and ascertainment setting.

## Risk Factors

- For Skull, risk factors should guide pretest probability and prevention, not replace objective assessment.

## High-Yield Facts

- Know boundaries, contents, supply, drainage, innervation, and the most testable clinical correlations.
